title: The New Zealand Story - Semi-unknown games
description:
YES, THE SERIES IS BACKKKKKKKKKK
Although I had to remove the Rush 2049 and the Hydro Thunder ones because of the music  -_-

This is an Arcade game featuring Tiki the Kiwi. It's a great platformer, and a pretty original one too.

That stupid Hypercam f**ked up the framerate :(
